title: CryptoCraft
description: A simple mod that adds to the Minecraft world the ability to mine virtual cryptocurrency, emulating the mining process through interesting game mechanics.
body:
A simple mod that adds a semblance of cryptomining.

Recommended [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei ) to understand crafting

There is a translation into Russian and English

There will be updates, but not often.
